title: elsholtzia stachyodes var. major
intro: Elsholtzia stachyodes var. major, also known as Major Vietnamese Agastache or Vietnamese licorice mint, is a plant species belonging to the mint family (Lamiaceae). It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Elsholtzia stachyodes var. major include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and soothe digestive problems. Herbal preparations of this plant include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
